title: JavaScript detected
description: A static JavaScript object or action marker is present.
technical_impact: Script-capable document behavior may execute in a compatible viewer.
business_impact: A user may be exposed to unsafe document behavior.
remediation: Keep the document isolated and validate in an approved sandbox.

title: Automatic execution action detected
description: An OpenAction or automatic action indicator is present.
technical_impact: A viewer may process an action when the document opens.
business_impact: Unexpected behavior may occur before user review.
remediation: Review the action statically and validate in an approved sandbox.

title: Launch action detected
description: A Launch action indicator is present.
technical_impact: A compatible viewer could request an external launch.
business_impact: Users may be prompted to run external content.
remediation: Do not launch referenced content; isolate and review.

title: Embedded executable-like artifact
description: Embedded-file metadata identifies an executable-like extension.
technical_impact: The attachment may contain executable content.
business_impact: Opening the attachment could create operational risk.
remediation: Do not extract or execute it; use approved sandbox validation.

title: Embedded script, archive, or macro-capable artifact
description: Embedded metadata identifies script, archive, or macro-capable content.
technical_impact: The attachment may contain active or nested content.
business_impact: Manual handling may expose users to unsafe content.
remediation: Keep embedded content isolated and validate separately.

title: External URI actions
description: One or more external URI strings are present.
technical_impact: A viewer could navigate to an external destination if activated.
business_impact: Users may be directed outside trusted systems.
remediation: Review sanitized destinations without opening them.

title: Suspicious or unsafe URI scheme
description: A URI uses a locally cataloged unsafe scheme.
technical_impact: The scheme may invoke non-web or active behavior.
business_impact: Activation could expose users or systems to unsafe handling.
remediation: Do not activate the URI; isolate and review.

title: Dynamic form or XFA content
description: AcroForm or XFA indicators are present.
technical_impact: Dynamic form behavior may be supported by compatible viewers.
business_impact: Form workflows may collect or transmit user data.
remediation: Review form actions and data destinations statically.

title: Encrypted document limits inspection
description: Encryption prevents complete static inspection; encryption is not inherently suspicious.
technical_impact: Some structure or content could not be inspected.
business_impact: Risk cannot be fully assessed without an authorized password.
remediation: Obtain an authorized decrypted copy through approved procedures.

title: Incremental-update or EOF anomaly
description: Multiple EOF markers or incremental-update indicators are present.
technical_impact: The file contains multiple structural revisions.
business_impact: Hidden or superseded content may require specialist review.
remediation: Perform deeper static review using approved tooling.

title: Metadata anomaly
description: Metadata contains a formatting, date, length, or command-like anomaly.
remediation: Validate document origin and metadata context.

title: Social-engineering text indicators
description: Bounded text contains conservative social-engineering indicators.
technical_impact: The content may attempt to influence user behavior.
business_impact: Users may be encouraged to disclose data or take unsafe action.
remediation: Validate the request through an independent trusted channel.

title: Excessive external-link or annotation count
description: Link or annotation volume exceeds a conservative review threshold.
technical_impact: High object volume complicates static review.
business_impact: Relevant destinations may be harder to validate.
remediation: Review the destination inventory and document purpose.

title: Suspicious or double-extension embedded filename
description: An embedded filename uses a suspicious, missing, long, or double extension.
technical_impact: The filename may obscure the attachment type.
remediation: Do not extract it; validate metadata and provenance.

title: Signature present but not verified
description: Signature presence detected — cryptographic validity was not verified.
technical_impact: Presence alone does not establish authenticity or integrity.
business_impact: Trust decisions require independent signature validation.
remediation: Validate the signature using approved cryptographic tooling.

title: Remote-file action or GoToR reference
description: A remote-file action reference is present.
technical_impact: A viewer may reference content outside this PDF.
business_impact: Users may be directed to untrusted remote content.
remediation: Do not open the reference; review the sanitized target.

title: Sensitive data embedded in URL query or metadata
description: A sensitive key name was found and its value was redacted.
technical_impact: Sensitive data may have been embedded in document metadata or links.
business_impact: Disclosure could affect accounts or confidential workflows.
remediation: Rotate exposed values if real and remove them from the document.
